templates.name: Interchangeable Curling Iron - what is it?
templates.content: Our first curl-conscious interchangeable curling iron is designed to empower, enhance & unleash the full potential of your curls, this innovative device boasts 3 distinct clip barrels for a personalized curling experience while safeguarding curls against damage. Check it out here: https://patternbeauty.com/products/interchangeable-curling-iron

templates.name: Interchangeable Curling Iron - change temperature
templates.content: To change the temperature, rotate the Temperature Control Dial left to decrease the temperature and to the right to increase the temperature.

templates.name: Interchangeable Curling Iron - automatic shut off
templates.content: The curling iron automatically shuts off after 60 minutes of non-use.

templates.name: Interchangeable Curling Iron - heat settings
templates.content: The curling iron has 8 heat settings: 250F, 275F, 300F, 325F, 350F, 375F, 400F, 425F.

templates.name: Interchangeable Curling Iron - turn on/off
templates.content: Press ON/OFF Button once to turn on, the LED display will light up. Press & hold ON/OFF Button for 2 seconds to turn off.

templates.name: Interchangeable Curling Iron - clip difference
templates.content: A 3⁄8" clip barrel is ideal for creating small curls, coils, & waves, whether using it to define wash n go styles, half up, half down, textured ponytails, or adorning braids & buns with tendrils.  A 3/4" clip barrel forms a deep, vintage wave. If you're looking to achieve a glamorous Hollywood style, choose the 3⁄4" barrel.  A 1" clip barrel is the standard & most versatile barrel size. You can create loose waves on shorter hair or beachy waves to full curls on medium to longer hair. Human hair wigs & weaves can be styled into voluminous curls, coils, & waves as well.

templates.name: Interchangeable Curling Iron - glove cleaning
templates.content: The heat protective glove is specifically designed to provide comfort and resistance from the heat of the barrels. We do not recommend washing the glove but instead wiping clean with warm water and soap should it become dirty.

templates.name: Interchangeable Curling Iron - coating
templates.content: The barrels all have Tourmaline Ceramic coating.

templates.name: Interchangeable Curling Iron - clean
templates.content: To clean the barrels, you can simply wipe it with a cloth. If deeper cleaning becomes necessary, disconnect the unit from the power source and allow it to cool.  Wipe the barrel with a soft, damp cloth.

templates.name: Can the products be used on synthetic hair?
templates.content: I wouldn't recommend using our products on synthetic hair.

templates.name: Is your packaging recyclable?
templates.content: Yes, we always try to keep sustainability in mind when bringing new products into the world. Our tubes & caps are both fully-recyclable polypropylene (PP), and you don't even have to separate the cap from the tube when recycling. Bottles are HDPE or glass (fully recyclable), and we use paper components where possible (paper is fully recyclable).

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://patternbeauty.com/pages/returns

templates.name: Are your products color-safe?
templates.content: Yes, they are!

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: You can find us at a store near you here: https://patternbeauty.com/apps/store-locator

templates.name: Are your products sulfate-free?
templates.content: Although our products are not sulfate-free, they are free of SLS & SLES. Our products do not contain any harsh, hair-stripping solvents, and our Hydration Shampoo provides the gentle suds needed to get in there while scrubbing the hair and scalp to give you a good wash day! Our products hydrate, condition, nourish and moisturize the hair even while cleaning.

templates.name: Are your products cruelty-free?
templates.content: Yes! No animals were harmed in the making of these products. We test all of our products on a panel of people with curly, coily, and tightly textured hair perfecting on us humans and never on animals. Our brand is PETA-certified!

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/patternbeauty/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/PatternBeauty

templates.name: Are your containers recyclable?
templates.content: Yes, we do our best to make sure our packaging is as sustainable as possible. All of our tubes and bottles are made of recyclable plastics and resins, so when you finish up your products please recycle.

templates.name: Do you use silicones?
templates.content: Our products are free of cyclic silicones (D4 & D5) complying with EU standards (these 2 types of silicones are believed by certain EU regulators to potentially be bad for the environment). We formulated our products being very conscious of the particular silicones we were choosing and at which levels in order to provide the best curly hair care experience without weighing down the hair. Our team continues to work with chemists to stay on top of new raw materials and technologies as we move towards silicone-free formulas in the future that don't compromise on performance.

templates.name: Can children use your products?
templates.content: Our formulas weren't designed for children, and we recommend products be used only by children 6 and up.

templates.name: Do your products contain nuts?
templates.content: While our formulas don't contain peanuts, which is the biggest allergen in the nut family, many of our formulas contain Sweet Almond Oil, which has been used for centuries in curly hair for moisture retention. Please consult your physician prior to use if you are known to have nut allergies.

templates.name: What is recommended for dry hair and scalp?
templates.content: No one knows your hair better than you, so inevitably the choice is yours. All our products have been formulated with hydration and conditioning as the key benefits of every product as we know curly heads of hair can experience the most trouble retaining moisture. Our Mini Conditioner Trial Bundle is great for experimenting with our 3 conditioners to learn which is yummiest for your hair, and our Jojoba Oil Hair Serum is especially beloved by dry, itchy scalps.

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at this link: https://patternbeauty.com/pages/contact-us?al_pg_id=9eb4332f-ec03-4af9-bdaf-1093b4b5b309. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Are your products gluten-free?
templates.content: While not all of our items are gluten-free, we do have a selection of products that are. Please use our filters on our website to find gluten-free products for your curls & coils.

templates.name: How do I define my curl type?
templates.content: Hair is evolving always and you could potentially have different curl patterns in different areas around your head or experience a shift in your hair as time, products and methods change. You may find our Curl Guide to be helpful as you find the right products for your unique, beautiful curls: https://patternbeauty.com/pages/curl-guide?al_pg_id=4c999010-beb0-41d9-9aac-9400c40780f6

templates.name: Is PATTERN vegan?
templates.content: Some of our items contain Honey which is known for its moisturizing properties, so no - not a fully-vegan line.

templates.name: Where are your items made / manufactured?
templates.content: Our products are proudly made in the USA utilizing domestic and imported components. Our tools and accessories are made in China.

templates.name: Rewards / referral
templates.content: We have a rewards/referral program where you can earn points to redeem on future purchases. Check it out here - https://patternbeauty.com/pages/rewards?al_pg_id=4c999010-beb0-41d9-9aac-9400c40780f6

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at (833) 99-CURLS, Monday-Friday from 9:30 am to 5 pm PST, or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Our processing time takes 2 to 3 business days and we usually ship via FedEx. Once shipped it will take 3-11 for domestic orders. We also offer 2 Day Shipping that takes 2 business days.

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: Sorry to hear you want to cancel/edit your order! Please contact us at hello@patternbeauty.com. We can only cancel/edit orders that haven't yet been processed for shipping.

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on domestic orders over $75. Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: Pre & Post-Purchase questions/issues
templates.content: For a more prompt turnaround to your question, please complete the information on our contact form and our team will be in touch shortly with assistance: https://patternbeauty.com/pages/contact-us

templates.name: I have a medical condition, can I use your products?
templates.content: I highly recommend consulting with your health practitioner before using any of our products, and if you have additional questions on this, please complete the information on our contact form: https://patternbeauty.com/pages/contact-us One of our reps will be in touch soon.

templates.name: Can both the shine and heat protectant be used simultaneously?
templates.content: We suggest using the heat protectant prior to blow drying and the shine spray after.

templates.name: Will the heat protectant protect my curls against the heat of your dryer?
templates.content: Yes, the heat protectant will help to protect your curls during the use of the Pattern Blow Dryer.

templates.name: How do I clean the filter?
templates.content: To maintain and deliver optimal performance it is recommended to clean your filter. First, unplug the hair dryer from the power supply. The rear filter area should be cool to the touch. Hold the handle firmly and gently rotate the filter cap counter-clockwise to release. Brush or wipe with a dry cloth any dust or debris. Attach the filter cap, turning clockwise to lock back into place.

templates.name: Blow Dryer - How do I choose the right temperature and speed setting for my hair type?
templates.content: We recommend choosing the temperature setting based on the hair's condition and texture. Opt for lower heat + speed settings for finer hair and higher settings for thick or coarse textures.

templates.name: What is shine spray used for?
templates.content: Shine Spray is a finishing spray that adds shine and protects against humidity.

templates.name: How should I store my hair dryer?
templates.content: When not in use, your dryer should be disconnected, allowed to cool, and stored in a safe, dry location out of reach of children. Do not twist the line cord or wrap it around the dryer. Allow the cord to hang or lie loose and straight at the point of entry into the dryer.

templates.name: How do I clean my dryer?
templates.content: Wipe down the dryer with a soft dry cloth after usage if your hands have a hair liquid product on them.

templates.name: What is the difference between diffusing and air drying and how is it better?
templates.content: Diffusing speeds up drying time by gently, dispersing air evenly over a wider area of the hair and helps to prevent frizz and enhance your natural curls. Air drying allows the hair to dry on its own, which causes the hair to be wet for a longer period of time. When hair is wet, it swells, making it more fragile and more susceptible to breakage.

templates.name: How do I know if the heat protectant works?
templates.content: It has been tried and tested amongst a diverse spectrum of textures. The hair will feel soft, moisturized, and have body after blow drying and your texture will revert on wash day.

templates.name: How long is the power cord?
templates.content: The power cord is 7 ft long.

templates.name: How do I attach the attachments to the dryer?
templates.content: To attach the attachment to the dryer line up the arrows and lock into place. To detach, press down on the two buttons on the sides of the dryer.

templates.name: Do I need to make a minimum purchase to use my points?
templates.content: No minimum purchase amount is required.

templates.name: How do I use the wide tooth comb attachment?
templates.content:
Starting from the ends and working up the strands, use the wide-tooth comb attachment to detangle, unleash volume, and stretch the hair. 

For the Brush Attachment, start from the ends and work up the strands, use the bristles to detangle and smooth the hair, section by section.

templates.name: Where is the serial number located?
templates.content: The model number and ETL listing information are silk-screened on the handle. The date code of when the dryer was manufactured is on the plug blade.

templates.name: How much does the dryer weigh?
templates.content: The Dryer weighs 508 grams/1.12 lbs.

templates.name: Can I use the dryer internationally?
templates.content: Yes, you can!

templates.name: Does the dryer come with a temperature dial/display?
templates.content: No, it doesn't. You can toggle between low, medium, or high heat settings and adjust the speed settings.

templates.name: How do I use the concentration attachment?
templates.content: Use the concentration attachment to direct airflow, keeping the blow dryer moving evenly along the section until it's dry. To elongate curly styles once hair is dry, grab hair, in sections, gently stretch and direct warm heat, for approximately 5 seconds per section, at the roots using the concentrator.

templates.name: How often should I clean the filter?
templates.content: It is ideal to clean any lint buildup as you see it.

templates.name: Is it required to use the heat protectant with the blow dryer?
templates.content: While it is not a requirement, it is highly encouraged.

templates.name: What is the wattage/voltage?
templates.content: The Blow Dryer has a wattage of 1875W and a voltage of 125V.

templates.content: You can take a look at our full warranty policy here: https://patternbeauty.com/pages/warranty?al_pg_id=4c999010-beb0-41d9-9aac-9400c40780f6

templates.name: Do points/rewards expire?
templates.content: Yes, they expire after 1 year of inactivity. In this context, inactivity refers to customers who have not earned or redeemed any points within the selected time frame. Customers who exceed 1 year without earning or redeeming points will lose their accrued point balance.

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest!  The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at hello@patternbeauty.com. Our team is happy to chat.
